_note: This file is deprecated. All tooling data has been migrated to Core/registries/tooling-registry.yaml following SPECTRA registry pattern. This file is kept temporarily for backward compatibility during migration.

shellProfiles.bash:
if [ -f "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/../../.env" ]; then
  set -o allexport
  source "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/../../.env"
  set +o allexport
fi
